title: Pokémon Go data reportedly used to train military AI systems
summary: Niantic denies sharing Pokémon Go data with drone companies, but it was revealed that game data was used to train AI for military drones.

title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation: Director criticizes streamers and adds more minigames
summary: The director of Final Fantasy VII Revelation calls the influence of streamers on RPGs a 'crisis' and confirms the game will have more minigames than Rebirth.

title: Crystal Dynamics defends use of generative AI in Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis
summary: Crystal Dynamics explains they used generative AI to speed up development, while early impressions of the game highlight its combination of past and present.

title: Valor Mortis delays its release to October to avoid competing with GTA 6
summary: The Ghostrunner studio postpones the launch of soulslike Valor Mortis from September 13 to October 13 to avoid the saturation of releases alongside GTA 6.

title: Sega's Stranger Than Heaven will explore a potential future of Tupac Shakur
summary: Sega's new game features unique combat and the inclusion of Tupac Shakur in a story about his possible future if he were still alive.

title: Xbox defends inclusion of advertisements in games
summary: Xbox's new strategy director reaffirms belief in in-game ads while other executives try to calm the criticism generated.

title: Xbox executives admit it has become difficult to defend the brand
summary: Several Microsoft spokespeople acknowledge Xbox's current challenges and ask for confidence that the situation will change soon.

title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake sparks debate
summary: Multiple analyses discuss the remake's challenges including voice acting, music, and necessary changes, while some defend the quality of the Water Temple.

title: Guides and tips for Forza Horizon 6
summary: Multiple outlets publish guides for completing missions and photos in Forza Horizon 6, including how to get the Guts. Glory. Ram. achievement.

title: Destiny 2 shows its ending and Bungie ends weekly newsletters
summary: The final cinematics of Destiny 2 mark a bittersweet ending for a truncated new saga, while Bungie announces the end of 'This Week in Destiny'.

title: Phantom Blade Zero changes its date to move closer to GTA 6
summary: Unlike other games, Phantom Blade Zero has moved up its release to coincide with GTA 6 and its creators claim to not fear competition.

title: Clutch combines Forza Horizon and Motorsport with a touch of Fast & Furious
summary: The new racing game Clutch mixes open-world and simulation elements, offering a unique experience according to early impressions.

title: Over the Hill presents itself as the off-road antidote to Forza Horizon
summary: Off-road driving game Over the Hill offers a relaxed yet challenging experience, ideal for those seeking something different from Forza Horizon.

title: The Walking Dead: Streets of Survival announced for multiple platforms
summary: A new side-scrolling fighting game of The Walking Dead titled Streets of Survival is announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC.

title: Gothic Remake reaches 500,000 copies sold
summary: The Gothic remake surpasses half a million sales, proving that affection for 'Eurojank' remains strong among players.

title: Nintendo imposes restrictions against Switch 2 scalpers in Japan
summary: Nintendo sets purchase requirements and language restrictions to combat Switch 2 scalpers in the Japanese market.

title: Will Wright and Maxis remember the nine-year development of Spore
summary: The creators of Spore share stories behind the development of the innovative simulation game, from a Mr. Potato Head to a cosmic documentary.

title: The Last of Us season 3 casts Peter Sarsgaard for an unseen role
summary: Actor Peter Sarsgaard, known for The Batman, joins the cast of the third season playing a new character.

title: Steven Spielberg returns to science fiction after eight years
summary: The iconic director prepares his return to the science fiction genre with a new project, generating great excitement among fans.

title: Tomb Raider remake targets February 2027
summary: After early impressions, the remake of the classic Tomb Raider targets a February release, although doubts persist about whether it can truly be remade.
